title: Successful login and session establishment
requirement: POST /rest/user/login（routes/login.ts）用邮箱与 MD5 哈希后的密码查询 Users 表。校验通过且 totpSecret 为空时返回 200 及 authentication.token、bid；服务端对该用户执行 BasketModel.findOrCreate，客户端将 JWT 写入 localStorage 与 cookie，合并 sessionStorage 中的游客购物车，并按 login 路由的 redirectUrl 跳转。
Data_Ranges: admin@juice-sh.op + admin123; jim/bender 等种子用户
Conditions: User exists; deletedAt IS NULL; totpSecret empty

title: Login form client-side validation
requirement: Angular 登录表单对 email 做 Validators.required，对 password 做 required 与 minLength(1)。邮箱或密码为空时 Log in 按钮禁用并显示 MANDATORY_EMAIL / MANDATORY_PASSWORD，不得向 POST /rest/user/login 发起请求；密码长度为 1 时可通过客户端校验并提交服务端。
Expected_Actions: No HTTP when invalid; BVA at length 1 boundary

title: Server-side login rejection
requirement: routes/login.ts 在密码 MD5 不匹配、邮箱无对应行、或用户 deletedAt 非空（SQL 含 AND deletedAt IS NULL）时返回 401 及 Invalid email or password。客户端清除 token/bid 并保持未登录；密码比对大小写敏感，email 字段不做 trim。
Data_Ranges: wrong password; unknown email; chris.pike@ soft-deleted
Conditions: MD5 hash compare; SQL includes deletedAt IS NULL

title: SQL injection via login email
requirement: login 路由将 req.body.email 直接拼入 Sequelize 原生 SQL 字符串（未参数化）。邮箱含引号、注释符或永真式（如 admin'--、' OR 1=1--）可能改变查询语义甚至在不校验密码的情况下返回 JWT；UNION 类 payload 视列对齐情况返回 200、401 或 500 并可能泄露数据库错误信息。
Expected_Actions: 200 with JWT possible or 401/500; document actual outcome

title: Login input handling and error display
requirement: 登录表单仅对 email 做必填校验，不含 @ 的畸形邮箱仍会提交 API。401 错误文案经 login 模板 {{error}} 插值展示，Angular 默认转义 email 中的 HTML；password 在服务端 MD5 后比对，错误响应中不回显明文密码。
Data_Ranges: admin (no @); <script> in email; HTML in password

title: JWT and session lifecycle
requirement: lib/insecurity.authorize 签发 RS256 JWT，expiresIn 为 6 小时；过期后访问受保护 API 应得 401。同一用户多次登录可在 authenticatedUsers.tokenMap 中并存多个有效 token；携带有效 Bearer token 时 GET /rest/user/whoami 返回当前用户 id、email、role 等字段。

title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
requirement: server.ts 未对 POST /rest/user/login 挂载 express-rate-limit，连续失败尝试不会返回 429；对比：POST /rest/user/reset-password 受 rateLimit 中间件保护（见密码与安全问答模块）。
Expected_Actions: Unlimited attempts; no 429 from login route

title: Remember-me OAuth and login UX
requirement: 勾选 Remember-me 时 login 组件将 email 写入 localStorage，下次访问预填。仅当当前 origin 落在 config.application.googleOauth.authorizedRedirects 内时显示 Google OAuth 按钮并跳转 accounts.google.com；否则 oauthUnavailable 为 true 隐藏按钮。密码字段支持明文/密文切换，Enter 键在表单 valid 时等同点击 Log in。
Data_Ranges: rememberMe true/false; authorized vs unauthorized origin
Expected_Actions: OAuth redirect or hidden; UX toggles work

title: 2FA gate after password at login
requirement: Users.totpSecret 非空时，login 在密码正确后返回 401、status totp_token_required 及 data.tmpToken（type password_valid_needs_second_factor_token），不签发完整会话 JWT；客户端保存 totp_tmp_token 并导航至 /2fa/enter。TOTP 校验及 setup/disable 见双因素认证模块 routes/2fa.ts。
Expected_Actions: 401 + tmpToken; no full session until TFA verify

title: Login error handling and exposed credentials
requirement: login 查询异常时 catch 调用 next(error)，经 Express 错误处理返回 500，客户端清理 token/bid。LoginComponent 源码中硬编码 testing@juice-sh.op / IamUsedForTesting，使用后可正常登录 admin 并触发 exposedCredentialsChallenge。
Data_Ranges: DB failure simulation; testing@ seed credentials
Conditions: catch next(error); exposed fields in component

title: Valid user registration
requirement: 新用户可通过注册表单创建账户并写入 Users 表。
Data_Ranges: unique email; password match; valid Q&A
Expected_Actions: 201 created; wallet may be auto-created; user can login

title: Duplicate email rejected
requirement: 已存在邮箱不得重复注册。

title: Password mismatch blocks registration
requirement: 两次密码不一致时不得创建用户。
Expected_Actions: Registration rejected; no new user row

title: Security question required
requirement: 注册必须选择安全问题并填写答案。

title: Email sanitization on registration

Data_Ranges: HTML or script in email field
Expected_Actions: Malicious payload stripped or rejected; differs from login SQL path

title: Empty required fields rejected
requirement: 缺少必填字段时注册失败。

title: Registration creates wallet
requirement: 成功注册后应关联创建 Wallet 记录供后续支付使用。
Expected_Actions: Wallet row exists for new UserId

title: Weak or short password on registration
requirement: 注册密码强度/长度策略与登录 minLength(1) 的差异行为。
Expected_Actions: Accepted or rejected per server rules; document vs login boundary

title: Invalid security answer rejected
requirement: 安全问题答案错误或缺失时注册失败。

Expected_Actions: 200 or success message; reset link/token generated

title: Password reset rate limited
requirement: 重置密码接口受 IP 限流保护。

title: Password reset unknown email
requirement: 未知邮箱重置应统一响应，避免用户枚举。
Expected_Actions: Same generic response as valid email or safe error

title: Change password with current credentials
requirement: 已登录用户可修改密码。
Expected_Actions: Password updated; old password invalid for login

title: Change password without current password
requirement: 修改密码接口在缺少当前密码时的行为（已知弱点场景）。
Input_Fields: newPassword; token or email in query
Expected_Actions: May allow change without verifying old password; document actual behavior

title: Retrieve security question for reset
requirement: 重置流程可查询用户绑定的安全问题。

title: Security answer verification on reset

title: Login vs reset rate limit contrast
requirement: 密码重置接口有限流而登录接口无，形成安全策略对比测试点。
Data_Ranges: 100+ reset requests per 5min window per IP

title: 2FA verify with valid TOTP after tmpToken
requirement: 用户在登录返回 totp_token_required 后，使用临时 tmpToken 与正确 TOTP 完成二次验证。
Conditions: totpSecret configured for user; verifySync within epochTolerance
Expected_Actions: 200 on POST /rest/2fa/verify; full JWT and bid returned

title: 2FA verify with invalid TOTP
requirement: 错误 TOTP 不得完成认证或签发完整会话令牌。
Expected_Actions: 401 on POST /rest/2fa/verify; no full session JWT

title: 2FA setup returns secret and QR
requirement: 已登录用户可发起 TOTP 绑定并获取 secret 与 QR 数据。
Expected_Actions: 200 with secret and QR payload; user not yet fully 2FA until verified

title: 2FA status reflects enrollment
requirement: 查询接口应反映当前用户是否已启用 2FA。

title: 2FA disable requires valid TOTP
requirement: 禁用 2FA 需验证当前 TOTP，防止未授权关闭。
Expected_Actions: 200 disables 2FA on success; 401 on wrong TOTP

title: 2FA verify rejects expired tmpToken
requirement: 临时 tmpToken 过期后不得用于完成 2FA。
